title: Hybrid Clear Water Ocean
description: A clear-water ocean material layered on deterministic spectral cascades, with three FFT bands, long Gerstner swell, shared sky reflection, screen-space sand-bed refraction, animated bed caustics, Beer-Lambert absorption, GGX sun highlights, crest scatter, and foam diagnostics.
backend: WebGL2 fragment FFT plus GLSL hybrid water
techniques: long Gerstner swell over spectral displacement
FFT derivative and Gerstner normal fusion
shared analytic sky and reflection radiance
animated caustic light on the refracted bed
